pliron

An Extensible Compiler IR Framework

pliron, short for "Programming Languages Intermediate RepresentatiON", is a compiler framework, inspired by MLIR and written natively in Rust. pliron enables compiler engineers to easily build an entire compiler pipeline by defining custom IRs, analyses, and transformations.

📚 API Documentation

Documentation for pliron crates

pliron
Core IR Framework
 pliron-derive
Derive Macros for IR Entities
 pliron-llvm
LLVM Dialect and Integration
